title: Orbital Phase Grid: Maximizing Resolvable Ground-Station Channels
strategies: arithmetic-run baseline: place slots 0..n-1; both sumset and difference set have size 2n-1 (score ~0.1)
marginal-gain greedy: anchor the two grid endpoints, then repeatedly add the slot that maximizes the new |A+A|+|A-A|
greedy Sidon prefix + fill: grow a strict-Sidon (distinct-difference) prefix while it fits, then fill remaining slots by marginal gain
local-search refinement: seed from the greedy layout and hill-climb by single-slot moves across several seeds to escape greedy's collisions
